name: IFAD Agreement 1976 (International Fund for Agricultural Development)
summary: The International Fund for Agricultural Development (IFAD) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-IFAD-treaty framework adopted by the UN World Food Conference + OPEC oil-revenue-recycling framework — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal rural-poverty-eradication + smallholder-agriculture framework + only UN specialized agency founded as oil-revenue-recycling mechanism framework (IFAD Agreement Establishing International Fund for Agricultural Development adopted 13 June 1976 in Rome Italy + effective 30 November 1977 + IFAD operations began 1978 + IFAD founded in response to 1973-1974 food crisis framework + UN World Food Conference 1974 framework — formal foundational IFAD treaty framework establishing comprehensive IFAD organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal rural-poverty-eradication + smallholder-agriculture framework + only UN specialized agency founded as oil-revenue-recycling mechanism framework via OPEC + OECD-DAC partnership framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Three-Lists framework: List A OECD-DAC + List B OPEC + List C Developing-Countries framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Climate Investment + Adaptation framework via ASAP Adaptation for Smallholder Agriculture Programme 2012 + ASAP+ 2019 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IFAD13 Twelfth Replenishment USD 1.4 billion 2025-2027 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Indigenous Peoples Forum 2011 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal RPSF Rural Poor Stimulus Facility 2020 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-IFAD-funding-cuts 2025 framework). The IFAD Agreement is binding upon 178 IFAD member states as of 2026 — substantial universal coverage framework. The Agreement is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal IFAD smallholder-rural-family framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-rural-family-displacement framework. The IFAD Governing Council + IFAD Executive Board + IFAD President + IFAD Secretariat are the formal IFAD bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The IFAD Agreement is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: IFAD Agreement
statutory_framework.relevance: Agreement Establishing International Fund for Agricultural Development adopted 13 June 1976 in Rome Italy + effective 30 November 1977 — formal foundational IFAD treaty framework establishing comprehensive IFAD organisation framework.

statutory_framework.title: IFAD13 Replenishment
statutory_framework.relevance: IFAD13 Twelfth Replenishment USD 1.4 billion adopted December 2024 + effective 2025-2027 — formal foundational IFAD13 Replenishment framework.

apex_courts.name: IFAD Governing Council
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for IFAD.

apex_courts.name: IFAD Executive Board
apex_courts.role: Formal executive body for IFAD composed of 18 members.

apex_courts.name: IFAD President
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for IFAD — Alvaro Lario IFAD President 2022-2025+ framework.

anonymisation_convention: IFAD-related communications operate via state-state framework via IFAD Governing Council + Executive Board; individual communications limited under IFAD framework.

key_developments.title: UN World Food Conference + IFAD proposal
key_developments.description: UN World Food Conference held 5-16 November 1974 in Rome Italy + IFAD proposal framework — predecessor framework to IFAD.

key_developments.title: IFAD Agreement adopted
key_developments.description: IFAD Agreement adopted 13 June 1976 in Rome Italy — formal foundational IFAD treaty framework adopted.

key_developments.title: IFAD Agreement enters force
key_developments.description: IFAD Agreement entered force 30 November 1977 — formal foundational IFAD treaty framework operational.

key_developments.title: IFAD operations begin
key_developments.description: IFAD operations began 1978 — formal foundational IFAD operational framework operational.

key_developments.title: IFAD Special Programme for Sub-Saharan African Countries (SPA)
key_developments.description: IFAD Special Programme for Sub-Saharan African Countries (SPA) launched 1991 — pivotal foundational IFAD Sub-Saharan-Africa rural-poverty-eradication framework + foundation for subsequent IFAD geographic-priority framework + structurally distinctive globally only modern UN specialized agency operating formal Sub-Saharan-Africa-priority rural-poverty framework + foundation for subsequent ASAP + ASAP+ + IFAD13 frameworks.

key_developments.title: IFAD Indigenous Peoples Forum established
key_developments.description: IFAD Indigenous Peoples Forum established 2011 — formal foundational IFAD Indigenous Peoples Forum framework operational.

key_developments.title: ASAP Adaptation for Smallholder Agriculture Programme
key_developments.description: ASAP Adaptation for Smallholder Agriculture Programme established 2012 — formal foundational ASAP framework operational.

key_developments.title: ASAP+ second phase
key_developments.description: ASAP+ second phase established 2019 — formal foundational ASAP+ framework operational.

key_developments.title: RPSF Rural Poor Stimulus Facility COVID-19
key_developments.description: Rural Poor Stimulus Facility RPSF established 2020 in response to COVID-19 — formal foundational RPSF framework operational.

key_developments.title: Alvaro Lario IFAD-President + IFAD-Climate-Action-2023 + COP28-MENA-Pathways framework
key_developments.description: Alvaro Lario IFAD-President 2022-onwards framework continuing through 2023 with IFAD Climate Action 2023 framework + COP28 Dubai November-December 2023 framework MENA Pathways for resilient food systems + continuing 178 IFAD member states + Three-Lists List A OECD-DAC + List B OPEC + List C Developing-Countries framework. IFAD Indigenous Peoples Forum + ASAP + ASAP+ institutional positions addressing PA-related issues within formal cross-border-rural-family-displacement framework. Substantively significant global rural-poverty-eradication-smallholder-agriculture supranational-binding-treaty institutional jurisprudential development.

key_developments.title: IFAD13 Replenishment + Trump-IFAD-cuts
key_developments.description: IFAD13 Twelfth Replenishment USD 1.4 billion effective 2025-2027 + Trump-administration-IFAD-funding-cuts 2025 framework — formal IFAD13 + Trump-cuts framework operational.

structural_findings: IFAD Agreement operates a supranational global binding-treaty framework — places IFAD Agreement in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal rural-poverty-eradication + smallholder-agriculture framework + only UN specialized agency founded as oil-revenue-recycling mechanism framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal rural-poverty-eradication + smallholder-agriculture framework + only UN specialized agency founded as oil-revenue-recycling mechanism framework via OPEC + OECD-DAC partnership + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Three-Lists framework: List A OECD-DAC + List B OPEC + List C Developing-Countries + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal ASAP + ASAP+ Climate Investment + Adaptation framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IFAD13 Twelfth Replenishment USD 1.4 billion 2025-2027 + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Indigenous Peoples Forum + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal RPSF Rural Poor Stimulus Facility + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-IFAD-funding-cuts 2025.

Central jurisdiction of formal IFAD Three-Lists framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Three-Lists framework via List A OECD-DAC + List B OPEC + List C Developing-Countries.

Central jurisdiction of formal IFAD ASAP + ASAP+ Climate Investment + Adaptation framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal smallholder-agriculture-climate-adaptation framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal IFAD13 Twelfth Replenishment framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IFAD13 USD 1.4 billion 2025-2027 framework.
178 IFAD member state ratification framework is structurally distinctive globally — substantial universal coverage framework.

1974 UN World Food Conference + 1976 IFAD Agreement + 1977 entry into force + 1978 operations + 2011 Indigenous Peoples Forum + 2012 ASAP + 2019 ASAP+ + 2020 RPSF COVID-19 + 2025 IFAD13 + Trump-cuts IFAD-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

IFAD Agreement + Three-Lists + ASAP + ASAP+ + Indigenous Peoples Forum + IFAD13 + RPSF formal septet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal cross-border-rural-family-displacement framework.
editorial_notes: IFAD Agreement jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global rural-poverty-eradication + smallholder-agriculture foundational-IFAD-treaty meta-framework (IFAD Agreement 1976/1977 + UN World Food Conference 1974 predecessor + Three-Lists OPEC-OECD-DAC oil-revenue-recycling + ASAP 2012 + ASAP+ 2019 + Indigenous Peoples Forum 2011 + RPSF 2020 + IFAD13 USD 1.4 billion 2025-2027 + Trump-IFAD-cuts 2025). Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal rural-poverty-eradication + smallholder-agriculture framework + only UN specialized agency founded as oil-revenue-recycling mechanism framework via OPEC + OECD-DAC partnership + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Three-Lists List A OECD-DAC + List B OPEC + List C Developing-Countries + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal ASAP + ASAP+ Climate Investment + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IFAD13 USD 1.4 billion 2025-2027 + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Indigenous Peoples Forum + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal RPSF Rural Poor Stimulus Facility + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-IFAD-cuts 2025 + central jurisdiction of formal Three-Lists + central jurisdiction of formal ASAP + ASAP+ + central jurisdiction of formal IFAD13 + 178 IFAD member states + IFAD Headquartered Rome + IFAD President Alvaro Lario 2022-2025 + 1974 UN World Food Conference + 1976 IFAD + 1977 entry into force + 1978 operations + 2011 Indigenous Peoples Forum + 2012 ASAP + 2019 ASAP+ + 2020 RPSF + 2025 IFAD13 + Trump-cuts IFAD-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: IFAD smallholder-rural-family framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-rural-family-displacement framework.
